narration: Lasers emit coherent light, a precise beam that stays focused over long distances.
visual_description: Context visual: Lasers emit coherent light, a precise beam that stays focused over long distances.

narration: Flashlights? They scatter light in all directions, losing intensity quickly.

narration: This coherence means lasers can cut through materials or send signals far away.

narration: So, next time you see a laser, remember, it’s not just strong light; it’s focused energy.
